message:
✨ Failover group UX: EPG, delete group, remove member (#97)

- Show now-playing EPG text on failover group row (from first member)
- Right-click group row → rename or delete group (with confirmation)
- Right-click expanded member → remove from group or play
- Add removeChannelFromFailoverGroup() database method
- Extract _reloadFailoverGroups() helper for instant state updates
- Replace slow _loadChannels() calls with _reloadFailoverGroups()

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
